description: Nice-to-haves from the 2026-07-02 review: (1) per-task duration column (started/ended already in the monitor files, unrendered); (2) show skipped counts (skipped tasks write no file and are excluded from node totals); (3) 'stale for Xm' indicator when a task's monitor file hasn't been written recently — the only signal a hung agent gives; (4) bundle or fall back the CDN mermaid for offline pods; (5) cap/paginate the table for multi-thousand-task runs; (6) fleet-level cost aggregation (per-agent cost lands on monitors; nothing sums it).
title: Dashboard: duration column, skipped counts, stale-task indicator, offline mermaid, cost rollup
